gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer found two false-negative paths in the initial guard: non-self aliases and invalid source symbols. Both were fixed, re-verified locally, and the reviewer returned APPROVED.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_public_package.py::test_cachet_brand_facade_delegates_to_document_package tests/test_public_package.py::test_cachet_typing_stub_tracks_document_public_api -q; git diff --check; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Added a public-package test guard that parses src/cachet/__init__.pyi and verifies the Cachet typing facade mirrors document_kv_cache.__all__.
why: The branded Cachet root import is manually typed through a stub; this prevents future public API drift between runtime exports and published typing metadata.
